title: PhaseNAS: Language-Model Driven Architecture Search with Dynamic Phase Adaptation

methodology.problem: Existing NAS methods use static LLM configurations throughout the search process, leading to resource mismatch and inefficiency.
methodology.solution: PhaseNAS - a dynamic, LLM-based neural architecture search framework
methodology.approach: Two-phase approach with broad exploration followed by refinement

applications: Complex perception tasks like object detection

contributions.name: Phase-Aware Dynamic Search
contributions.description: A phase-aware controller that adaptively alternates between broad exploration and focused refinement, guided by the distribution of top-performing architectures.

contributions.name: Unified Architecture Template Language
contributions.description: A structured, parameter-based template language for architecture representation.

novelty: Extends LLM-based NAS to object detection tasks, which is different from prior works that mainly focus on image classification.
